Two macros in one reply — one good, one malformed.

[CREATE_CONTINUOUS name="first-good" work_dir="/tmp/robyx-test-workspace/good"]
[CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]
{
  "objective": "This one is fine.",
  "success_criteria": ["ok"],
  "first_step": {"number": 1, "description": "profile"}
}
[/CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]

And the second one:

[CREATE_CONTINUOUS name="second-bad" work_dir="/tmp/robyx-test-workspace/bad2"]
[CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]
{
  "objective": "Trailing comma breaks JSON.",
  "success_criteria": ["x",],
  "first_step": {"number": 1, "description": "x"},
}
[/CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]
